aluxVsOthers.article.text.source: Blockchains are essentially state transition machines. ALUX expands the model from short, isolated VM calls into replayable long transactions: cross-block execution and verifiable Web 2 I/O today, with cross-runtime and cross-shard composition as the broader architecture.
aluxVsOthers.article.text.text: 区块链本质上是状态转换机器。ALUX 将模型从短时、孤立的虚拟机调用扩展为可重放的长交易：当前已支持跨区块执行与可验证的 Web 2 I/O；跨运行时与跨分片组合则属于更广泛的架构方向。

home.hero.text.source: Imagine one logical virtual machine that runs everywhere—on a public blockchain, on a private cluster, and on client hardware such as phones and browsers—while abstracting away the state, threads, replication, and consensus underneath. Developers write one concurrent program; where it runs becomes a configuration choice, not an architecture. Its parts still commit together, atomically. That is Virtual Machine Abstraction, and ALUX is building it.
home.hero.text.text: 设想一个无处不在的逻辑虚拟机——运行在公有区块链、私有集群，以及手机和浏览器等客户端硬件上，同时把底层的状态、线程、复制与共识全部抽象起来。开发者只需编写一套并发程序；程序运行在哪里，只是配置选择，而不再决定应用架构。各个部分仍然一起提交，并保持原子性。这就是虚拟机抽象，而 ALUX 正在构建它。

home.sections.9.items.0.0.source: Is ALUX just another faster L1?
home.sections.9.items.0.0.text: ALUX 只是又一条更快的 L1 吗？
home.sections.9.items.0.0.reviewerNotes: Human-reviewed FAQ sync for updated ALUX homepage copy.

home.sections.9.items.0.1.source: No. Faster L1s accelerate the same abstraction: one-shot state updates that happen within one block. ALUX is a decentralized concurrent runtime for Long Transactions that can wait, resume, join across multiple channels, or select whichever channel becomes ready first; their state updates are no longer constrained by a block boundary. Through its GLVM architecture—Virtual Machine Abstraction—the same logical transaction is designed to extend beyond block boundaries toward shard and system boundaries.
home.sections.9.items.0.1.text: 不是。更快的 L1 加速的是同一种抽象：发生在单个区块内的一次性状态更新。ALUX 是面向长交易（Long Transaction）的去中心化并发运行时；交易可以等待、恢复、汇合多个通道，或选择第一个就绪的通道，其状态更新不再受区块边界限制。通过 GLVM 架构——虚拟机抽象——同一笔逻辑交易被设计为能够越过区块边界，并进一步延伸到分片与系统边界。
home.sections.9.items.0.1.reviewerNotes: Reviewed against the current English homepage source.

home.sections.9.items.1.0.source: What becomes possible on ALUX that ordinary smart contracts cannot do?
home.sections.9.items.1.0.text: ALUX 能实现哪些普通智能合约做不到的事？
home.sections.9.items.1.0.reviewerNotes: Native Simplified Chinese review against the current English source and ALUX terminology baseline.

home.sections.9.items.1.1.source: ALUX programs can fork into concurrent processes, wait for external inputs, join results from multiple channels, select the first event that becomes ready, and still commit the complete transaction atomically. Replay and commit mechanisms let validators reproduce the same outcome without exposing partial state.
home.sections.9.items.1.1.text: ALUX 程序可以分叉为并发进程、等待外部输入、汇合多个通道的结果、选择第一个就绪的事件，同时仍对完整交易进行原子提交。重放与提交机制让验证者能够复现相同结果，而不暴露局部状态。

home.sections.9.items.2.0.source: Why is ALUX built for AI agents?
home.sections.9.items.2.0.text: 为什么 ALUX 天然适合 AI 智能体？
home.sections.9.items.2.0.reviewerNotes: Human-reviewed FAQ sync for updated ALUX homepage copy.

home.sections.9.items.2.1.source: An on-chain agent is naturally a Long Transaction. Calling an LLM or a tool takes time; it cannot complete instantly—one only has to look at a Claude Code or Codex session. In other words, ALUX is a decentralized durable execution engine for agents.

home.sections.9.items.5.1.source: TVM runs EVM bytecode inside isolated sandboxes, so most EVM contracts can be migrated to ALUX with minimal changes. ALUX also presents an Ethereum-compatible view through a set of commonly used eth_* JSON-RPC methods.

home.sections.9.items.6.0.source: Some other chains also claim to support cross-block transactions. How is ALUX different?
home.sections.9.items.6.0.text: 其他一些区块链也声称支持跨区块交易。ALUX 有何不同？
home.sections.9.items.6.0.reviewerNotes: Reviewed against the current English homepage source.

home.sections.9.items.6.1.source:
The keyword is atomicity.

Compensation / Saga: commit → commit → ✗ fail → run compensating undo
Each step commits locally, intermediate states are visible, compensation can also fail, and external effects cannot always be reversed. This is eventual consistency. Some asynchronous chains, including ICP and Rialo, lean on this model. It is easier to implement, but unsuitable for applications that require stronger ACID guarantees.

ALUX all-or-nothing: stage → stage → ✗ fail → discard everything
Nothing commits until the whole transaction commits. On abort, uncommitted effects are discarded and no partial state becomes observable. That is true ACID atomicity across block heights.
home.sections.9.items.6.1.text:
关键词是原子性。

补偿 / Saga： commit → commit → ✗ fail → run compensating undo
每一步都在本地提交，中间状态可见，补偿本身也可能失败，而且外部影响并非总能撤销。这属于最终一致性。包括 ICP 与 Rialo 在内的一些异步区块链采用了这一模型。它更容易实现，却不适合需要更强 ACID 保证的应用。

ALUX 全有或全无： stage → stage → ✗ fail → discard everything
只有整笔交易提交时，任何内容才会提交。发生中止时，未提交的影响会被全部丢弃，不会暴露任何局部状态。这才是跨区块高度的真正 ACID 原子性。

parallelConcurrentComposable.intro.text.source: Parallel runs independent transactions at the same time. Concurrency lets transactions interact through channels: one transaction can wait for a matching message from another, then continue. Composability binds state transitions from different systems into one auditable atomic transition.
parallelConcurrentComposable.intro.text.text: 并行让互不依赖的交易同时执行。并发让交易通过通道交互：一笔交易可以等待另一笔交易发来匹配消息，再继续执行。组合把不同执行系统中的状态转移放进同一个结算边界，使它们作为一次可审计的原子状态转移完成结算。

parallelConcurrentComposable.metaDescrip.text: 以可视化方式介绍 ALUX 当前的并行执行与消息驱动协作，以及跨系统原子组合的目标模型。
parallelConcurrentComposable.metaDescrip.reviewerNotes: Native Simplified Chinese review against the current English source and ALUX baseline.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.alt.source: Multiple isolated execution rails moving forward at the same time.
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.alt.text: 多条相互隔离的执行轨道同时向前推进。
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.alt.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.con.source: Parallelism finds several answers at once. It does not make those jobs interact.
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.con.text: 并行可以同时得到多项结果，但不会让这些任务彼此交互。
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.con.reviewerNotes: Native Simplified Chinese review against the current English source and ALUX terminology baseline.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.cue.text: 4 项查询各自在独立轨道完成
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.cue.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.ena.source: More independent work finishes in the same amount of time. But parallelism alone cannot make those jobs exchange messages or let a long transaction wait and continue.
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.ena.text: 同样时间里能完成更多独立工作，但单靠并行，既不能让这些工作交换消息，也不能让一笔长交易等待后继续。
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.ena.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.how.source: Parallel execution is native to ALUX's process calculus: transactions share no memory, and any interaction is confined to tuple-space channels. Independent transactions therefore advance in separate TVM lanes, while Block Merge resolves state overlap at commit time.
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.how.text: 并行执行是 ALUX 进程演算的原生能力：交易不共享内存，任何交互都只能通过元组空间通道发生。互不依赖的交易因此可以在不同 TVM 执行轨道上推进，提交时若出现状态重叠，再由 Block Merge 裁决。
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.how.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.lab.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.tit.source:
Flight, hotel, transfer, and insurance
search at the same time
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.tit.text:
航班、酒店、接送和保险
同时查询
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.tit.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.wha.source: Parallel execution means independent jobs run at the same time. A travel agent can search flights, rooms, transfers, and insurance without making one search wait behind another.
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.wha.text: 并行指多项互不依赖的工作同时执行。旅行智能体可以同时查询航班、房间、接送和保险，不必让一项查询排在另一项后面。
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.0.wha.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.alt.source: Two transactions interact through a tuple-space channel: one waits for a matching message, the other sends it, and the waiting continuation resumes while unrelated work keeps moving.
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.alt.text: 两笔交易通过元组空间通道交互：一笔等待匹配消息，另一笔发送消息；消息匹配后，等待中的后续执行被唤醒，其他工作仍继续运行。
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.alt.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.con.source: Concurrency turns a reply into the next step: the match creates a new continuation instead of merely restarting a stopped lane.
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.con.text: 并发把一次回复变成下一步执行：消息匹配会生成新的后续执行，而不是让停住的轨道原地重启。
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.con.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.cue.source: The booking waits; a hotel agent replies; the next step begins
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.cue.text: 预订先等待；酒店智能体回复；下一步被唤醒
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.cue.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.ena.source: A travel agent can keep one long transaction alive across blocks: it waits for room availability, an API response, or a user decision, then continues without blocking unrelated work.
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.ena.text: 旅行智能体可以让一笔长交易跨区块等待房态、API 回复或用户决定，并在条件满足后继续执行，同时不阻塞无关工作。
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.ena.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.how.source: The waiting consume is stored as a resource in tuple space. A produce from another transaction matches it, triggering a COMM event that spawns the continuation and moves the Execution Context from Inactive back to Running. If more than one match is possible, ReplayTrie records the chosen COMM for deterministic replay.
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.how.text: 等待方的接收请求（consume）会作为等待资源保存在元组空间中；另一笔交易发出（produce）匹配数据后触发 COMM 事件，生成等待方的后续执行（continuation），并让执行上下文从非活动状态恢复为运行状态。当存在多个候选匹配时，ReplayTrie 记录实际选中的 COMM，供验证者确定性重放。
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.how.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.lab.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.tit.source:
A booking waits for availability
and continues when the reply arrives
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.tit.text:
预订等待房态，
收到回复后继续
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.tit.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.wha.source: Concurrency begins when jobs interact. A booking can leave a waiting condition in a channel, and a hotel service can satisfy it later by sending the matching availability message.
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.wha.text: 并发从工作之间发生交互开始。预订可以在通道中留下等待条件，酒店服务稍后发回匹配的房态消息，预订再继续。
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.1.wha.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.alt.source: A room reservation and payment authorization arrive from different systems. Only after both are ready does one booking confirmation leave the atomic boundary.
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.alt.text: 房间预订和支付授权分别来自两个系统；只有两边都准备好后，原子边界才输出一份预订确认结果。
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.alt.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.con.source: The target composition model gives different systems one all-or-nothing result; concurrency carries the messages that lead up to that shared commit.
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.con.text: 目标组合模型让不同系统得到一个全有或全无的结果；并发负责传递共同提交前的消息。
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.con.reviewerNotes: Native Simplified Chinese review against the current English source and ALUX baseline.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.cue.source: The booking confirms only when reservation and payment both succeed
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.cue.text: 只有预订和付款都成功，订单才确认
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.cue.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.ena.source: The intended result is to avoid a half-finished booking such as money charged without a room, or a room held without payment.
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.ena.text: 预期结果是避免出现只扣款却没有房间，或只锁房却没有完成付款的半成品预订。
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.ena.reviewerNotes: Native Simplified Chinese review against the current English source and ALUX baseline.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.how.source: The current runtime provides tuple-space coordination, scoped OCAP references, cross-block continuation, ReplayTrie, and Block Merge. End-to-end atomic composition across independent external systems remains a design target built from those primitives.
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.how.text: 当前运行时已经提供元组空间协作、限定范围的 OCAP 引用、跨区块后续执行、ReplayTrie 与 Block Merge。基于这些原语，在彼此独立的外部系统之间实现端到端原子组合，仍属于设计目标。
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.how.reviewerNotes: Native Simplified Chinese review against the current English source and ALUX baseline.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.lab.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.tit.text:
房间锁定与付款
共同确认
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.tit.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.wha.source: Composition is not ordinary bundling. The target in this example is to commit the room hold and payment authorization together, or commit neither one.
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.wha.text: 组合不是把多项工作简单打包。这个示例的目标，是让房间锁定与付款授权要么共同提交，要么都不提交。
parallelConcurrentComposable.modes.2.wha.reviewerNotes: Native Simplified Chinese review against the current English source and ALUX baseline.

team.sections.0.items.0.bio.0.source: Frank is a concurrent systems architect. Before ALUX, he spent nearly 20 years at Lehman Brothers, Barclays Capital, and Bloomberg as a senior quant and derivatives engineer, building Wall Street-grade risk systems that had to stay correct under concurrency — across time zones, organizations, and milliseconds.
team.sections.0.items.0.bio.0.text: Frank 是一位并发系统架构师。投入 ALUX 之前，他曾在雷曼兄弟、巴克莱资本和彭博担任高级量化分析师与衍生品工程师近 20 年，构建必须在跨时区、跨组织、毫秒级并发下保持正确的华尔街级风险系统。
team.sections.0.items.0.bio.0.reviewerNotes: Native Simplified Chinese review against the current English source and ALUX terminology baseline.

team.sections.0.items.0.bio.1.source: That career left him with one conviction: the synchronous execution model has reached its end. ALUX is his answer. He led the design of its core stack:
team.sections.0.items.0.bio.1.text: 这段经历让他确信一件事：同步执行模型已经走到尽头。ALUX 是他的回答。他主导设计了核心技术栈：
team.sections.0.items.0.bio.1.reviewerNotes: Native Simplified Chinese review against the current English source and ALUX terminology baseline.

team.sections.0.items.0.closing.0.source: Virtual machine, language, and consensus interlock into one system where concurrent execution and composability finally hold together — a protocol layer built for an open, composable economy of AI agents.
team.sections.0.items.0.closing.0.text: 虚拟机、语言、共识三者咬合成一个系统，让并发执行与可组合性第一次同时成立——一个为开放、可组合的 AI 智能体经济而生的协议层。

team.sections.0.items.0.highlights.0.1.source: Processes interact concurrently through channels; pattern matching is scheduling; capability credentials are authorization.
team.sections.0.items.0.highlights.0.1.text: 进程通过通道并发交互，模式匹配即调度，能力凭证即授权。

team.sections.0.items.0.highlights.1.1.source: Tolang encodes channel descriptors and behavioral types so some misuse can be caught early, while the runtime enforces lifecycle constraints.

team.sections.0.items.0.highlights.2.1.source: A channel reference is unforgeable and transferable; scope and lifecycle rules limit authority without relying on address-based access alone.
team.sections.0.items.0.highlights.2.1.text: 通道引用不可伪造且可以传递；权限范围与生命周期规则负责限制能力，而不只依赖基于地址的访问控制。

team.sections.0.items.0.highlights.3.1.source: Validators produce DAG blocks concurrently. BlockGit uses rotating leader selection for finality, while Block Merge resolves overlapping work.

team.sections.0.items.1.bio.0.source: Tomislav's path into computing started early: a cardboard calculator at five, assembly on a C64c by ten. A decade in electronics and two more as a polyglot programmer — from JavaScript to Haskell — taught him to think from the metal up.
team.sections.0.items.1.bio.0.text: Tomislav 与计算的缘分开始得很早：5 岁用纸板做计算器，10 岁在 C64c 上写汇编。此后十余年深入电子技术，又用二十年成长为从 JavaScript 到 Haskell 的多语言程序员——习惯从底层硬件一路向上思考。
team.sections.0.items.1.bio.0.reviewerNotes: Manual Codex localization pass: synced from the current English Team page and reviewed for native fluency.

team.sections.0.items.1.bio.1.source: At ALUX he works where theory meets the runtime: using process calculus to make concurrency a first-class citizen, not an afterthought.

team.sections.0.items.2.bio.0.source: Tom is a blockchain developer focused on consensus protocol research — at ALUX, that means BlockGit, the DAG consensus design that lets validators produce blocks concurrently without a permanent leader.

vs.sections.0.statement.source: The capability runtime for production AI agents.
vs.sections.0.statement.text: 生产级 AI 智能体需要的能力运行时。
vs.sections.0.statement.reviewerNotes: Imported from the existing in-script localized copy.

vs.sections.0.text.source: AI agents stop being simple calls once they enter production. They wait for APIs and people, coordinate with other agents, carry scoped authority, and need a record of what happened. ALUX gives that work a decentralized service runtime.
vs.sections.0.text.text: AI 智能体进入生产环境后，就不再只是一次调用。它们要等待 API 和人的回应，与其他智能体协作，携带有边界的权限，并留下完整记录。ALUX 提供这类工作所需的去中心化服务运行时。
vs.sections.0.text.reviewerNotes: Semi-automatic AI-assisted human review in Codex.

vs.sections.1.outro.source: ALUX is not just AI on-chain. It is infrastructure for agent permissions, coordination, and traceable accountability.
vs.sections.1.outro.text: ALUX 不只是把 AI 放到链上。它是智能体权限、协调和可追踪问责的基础设施。

vs.sections.1.text.source: Once agent work can actually stay alive, ALUX gives it three platform layers: permissions, coordination, and accountability.
vs.sections.1.text.text: 当智能体工作可以真正持续运行时，ALUX 为它提供三层平台能力：权限、协同，以及可追溯、可核验的记录。

vs.sections.2.text.source: An agent workflow does not need to collapse into one bounded call. It can enter with capability scope, branch into concurrent work, suspend at external waits, resume in a later block, and leave an accountable record.
vs.sections.2.text.text: 智能体工作流不必压缩成一次有边界的调用。它可以带着能力范围进入，分叉成并发任务，在外部等待点暂停，在之后的区块中恢复，并留下可追责记录。

vs.sections.4.text.source: Production-grade agents need a body, a brain, an immune system, and a social layer. Intelligence is only one part of the machine; the runtime must keep work alive, contain risk, and connect work across organizations.
